# omada_controller_certificate (Resource)

Manages the TLS certificate for the Omada SDN Controller.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `certificate_pem` (String, Sensitive) The PEM-encoded certificate (public key) for the Omada Controller. Can be a single leaf certificate or a full chain (leaf + intermediates + root).
- `private_key_pem` (String, Sensitive) The PEM-encoded private key for the Omada Controller certificate.

### Read-Only

- `cert_id` (String) The certificate ID returned by the controller after upload (computed).
- `id` (String) The unique identifier of the controller certificate resource. Always set to 'controller-cert'.
- `key_id` (String) The private key ID returned by the controller after upload (computed).
